debug_info.goal:
x y z : ℝ
h₀ : 0 ≤ x ∧ 0 ≤ y ∧ 0 ≤ z
h₁ : x + y + z = 1
⊢ 0 ≤ y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z ∧ y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z ≤ 7 / 27

proof:
have h₂ : 0 ≤ y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z := by
    have h₃ : 0 ≤ x * y := by nlinarith
    have h₄ : 0 ≤ y * z := by nlinarith
    have h₅ : 0 ≤ z * x := by nlinarith
    have h₆ : 0 ≤ x * y * z := by nlinarith [h₀.1, h₀.2.1, h₀.2.2]
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x),
      mul_nonneg h₀.1 h₀.2.1, mul_nonneg h₀.2.1 h₀.2.2,
      mul_nonneg h₀.2.2 h₀.1]
  
  have h₃ : y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z ≤ (7 : ℝ) / (27 : ℝ) := by
    have h₄ : (x + y + z) ^ 2 = 1 := by
      rw [h₁]
      <;> ring
    have h₅ : 0 ≤ x * y := by nlinarith
    have h₆ : 0 ≤ y * z := by nlinarith
    have h₇ : 0 ≤ z * x := by nlinarith
    have h₈ : 0 ≤ x * y * z := by
      apply mul_nonneg <;> nlinarith
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x),
      sq_nonneg (x + y + z), sq_nonneg (x - y + z), sq_nonneg (x + y - z),
      sq_nonneg (x - y - z)]
  
  exact ⟨h₂, h₃⟩
failed_attempts:
have h₂ : 0 ≤ y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z := by
    have h₃ : 0 ≤ x := by linarith
    have h₄ : 0 ≤ y := by linarith
    have h₅ : 0 ≤ z := by linarith
    have h₆ : 0 ≤ x * y := by positivity
    have h₇ : 0 ≤ y * z := by positivity
    have h₈ : 0 ≤ z * x := by positivity
    have h₉ : 0 ≤ x * y * z := by positivity
    have h₁₀ : (1 - x) * (1 - y) * (1 - z) ≥ 0 := by
      have h₁₁ : 1 - x = y + z := by linarith
      have h₁₂ : 1 - y = x + z := by linarith
      have h₁₃ : 1 - z = x + y := by linarith
      rw [h₁₁, h₁₂, h₁₃]
      have h₁₄ : 0 ≤ y + z := by linarith
      have h₁₅ : 0 ≤ x + z := by linarith
      have h₁₆ : 0 ≤ x + y := by linarith
      have h₁₇ : 0 ≤ (y + z) * (x + z) := by positivity
      have h₁₈ : 0 ≤ (y + z) * (x + z) * (x + y) := by positivity
      linarith
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x)]
  
  have h₃ : y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z ≤ (7 : ℝ) / (27 : ℝ) := by
    have h₄ : (x + y + z) ^ 2 = 1 := by
      rw [h₁]
      <;> ring
    have h₅ : 0 ≤ x := by linarith
    have h₆ : 0 ≤ y := by linarith
    have h₇ : 0 ≤ z := by linarith
    have h₈ : 0 ≤ x * y := by positivity
    have h₉ : 0 ≤ y * z := by positivity
    have h₁₀ : 0 ≤ z * x := by positivity
    have h₁₁ : 0 ≤ x * y * z := by positivity
    -- Use the fact that the expression is symmetric and the maximum is achieved when two variables are equal
    -- and the third is 1/3.
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x),
      sq_nonneg (x + y + z), sq_nonneg (x + y - 2 * z), sq_nonneg (x + z - 2 * y),
      sq_nonneg (y + z - 2 * x)]
  
  exact ⟨h₂, h₃⟩

refine' ⟨_, _⟩
  · -- Prove the lower bound: 0 ≤ yz + zx + xy - 2xyz
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x),
      mul_nonneg h₀.1 h₀.2.1, mul_nonneg h₀.2.1 h₀.2.2, mul_nonneg h₀.2.2 h₀.1,
      mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg h₀.1 h₀.2.1) h₀.2.2]
  · -- Prove the upper bound: yz + zx + xy - 2xyz ≤ 7/27
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x),
      sq_nonneg (x + y + z), sq_nonneg (x + y + z - 3 * x),
      sq_nonneg (x + y + z - 3 * y), sq_nonneg (x + y + z - 3 * z),
      mul_nonneg h₀.1 h₀.2.1, mul_nonneg h₀.2.1 h₀.2.2, mul_nonneg h₀.2.2 h₀.1,
      mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg h₀.1 h₀.2.1) h₀.2.2]

have h₂ : 0 ≤ y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z := by
    have h₃ : 0 ≤ x * y := by nlinarith
    have h₄ : 0 ≤ y * z := by nlinarith
    have h₅ : 0 ≤ z * x := by nlinarith
    have h₆ : 0 ≤ x * y * z := by
      have h₇ : 0 ≤ x * y := by nlinarith
      nlinarith
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x)]
  
  have h₃ : y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z ≤ 7 / 27 := by
    have h₄ : (x + y + z) ^ 2 = 1 := by
      rw [h₁]
      <;> ring
    have h₅ : 0 ≤ x * y := by nlinarith
    have h₆ : 0 ≤ y * z := by nlinarith
    have h₇ : 0 ≤ z * x := by nlinarith
    have h₈ : 0 ≤ x * y * z := by
      have h₉ : 0 ≤ x * y := by nlinarith
      nlinarith
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x),
      sq_nonneg (x + y + z), sq_nonneg (x + y - 2 * z), sq_nonneg (y + z - 2 * x),
      sq_nonneg (z + x - 2 * y)]
  
  exact ⟨h₂, h₃⟩

have h₂ : 0 ≤ y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z := by
    have h₃ : 0 ≤ x := by linarith
    have h₄ : 0 ≤ y := by linarith
    have h₅ : 0 ≤ z := by linarith
    have h₆ : 0 ≤ x * y := by positivity
    have h₇ : 0 ≤ y * z := by positivity
    have h₈ : 0 ≤ z * x := by positivity
    have h₉ : 0 ≤ x * y * z := by positivity
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x),
      mul_nonneg h₃ h₄, mul_nonneg h₄ h₅, mul_nonneg h₅ h₃]
  have h₃ : y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z ≤ (7 : ℝ) / (27 : ℝ) := by
    have h₄ : (x + y + z) ^ 2 = 1 := by
      rw [h₁]
      <;> ring
    have h₅ : 0 ≤ x := by linarith
    have h₆ : 0 ≤ y := by linarith
    have h₇ : 0 ≤ z := by linarith
    have h₈ : 0 ≤ x * y := by positivity
    have h₉ : 0 ≤ y * z := by positivity
    have h₁₀ : 0 ≤ z * x := by positivity
    have h₁₁ : 0 ≤ x * y * z := by positivity
    -- Use non-linear arithmetic to prove the inequality
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x),
      sq_nonneg (x + y + z), sq_nonneg (x - 1 / 3), sq_nonneg (y - 1 / 3),
      sq_nonneg (z - 1 / 3)]
  exact ⟨h₂, h₃⟩

have h₂ : 0 ≤ y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z := by
    have h₃ : 0 ≤ x := by linarith
    have h₄ : 0 ≤ y := by linarith

    have h₆ : 0 ≤ x * y := by positivity

    have h₁₀ : 0 ≤ x * y * z * 2 := by positivity
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x)]
  
  have h₃ : y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z ≤ (7 : ℝ) / (27 : ℝ) := by
    have h₄ : (x + y + z) ^ 2 = 1 := by

    have h₅ : 0 ≤ x * y := by

    have h₉ : (x + y + z) ^ 3 = 1 := by

      <;> ring
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x),

  exact ⟨h₂, h₃⟩

  exact ⟨h₆, h₇⟩

    have h₁₀ : 0 ≤ z * x := by positivity
